highlights.title: Philippines Asks Facebook to Curb Fake News, Warns of Legal Move
highlights.description: The Philippine government has asked Meta Platforms Inc., the parent company of Facebook, to implement measures to curb the spread of “false and panic-inducing content” on its platforms, warning of possible legal action if the company fails to act swiftly.
